本頁整合 Pibrentasvir 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Maviret is indicated for the treatment of chronic hepatitis C virus (HCV) infection in adults and children aged 3 years and older. Maviret coated granules is indicated for the treatment of chronic...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>chronic hepatitis C virus infection（100.0%）</li>
<li>hepatitis C virus infection（99.9%）</li>
<li>hepatitis B virus infection（99.8%）</li>
<li>HIV infectious disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>hepatitis E virus infection（99.8%）</li>
<li>hepatitis A virus infection（99.8%）</li>
<li>hepatitis, viral, animal（99.8%）</li>
<li>Omsk hemorrhagic fever（99.8%）</li>
<li>Kyasanur forest disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>feline acquired immunodeficiency syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>simian immunodeficiency virus infection（99.7%）</li>
<li>neurodevelopmental disorder with ataxic gait, absent speech, and decreased cortical white matter（99.6%）</li>
<li>chronic hepatitis B virus infection（99.0%）</li>
<li>obsolete familial combined hyperlipidemia（97.6%）</li>
<li>fibroma of prostate（96.7%）</li>
<li>benign reproductive system neoplasm（96.5%）</li>
<li>Brenner tumor（96.5%）</li>
<li>benign prostate phyllodes tumor（96.4%）</li>
<li>male reproductive organ cancer（95.9%）</li>
<li>prostate leiomyoma（95.2%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
